UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores core information about a user, including their role, creation, and last activity timestamps. This entity links to other user-specific data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

role.description: The assigned role of the user within the application (e.g., 'standard', 'admin').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user was active in the application.

modeDefault.description: The identifier of the default dashboard mode set for this user (e.g., 'MinimalMode').

MarketAsset.title: MarketAsset
MarketAsset.description: Represents a single financial asset from any market type (Forex, Crypto, etc.).

UserPreference.title: UserPreference
UserPreference.description: Stores user-specific application preferences and visual settings, including details for schema versioning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserPreference entity.

schemaVersion.description: The version of the user preference schema, used for migration purposes.

lastMigratedAt.description: Timestamp of the last successful migration of this preference schema.

visualProfileMotion.description: User's preference for UI animations and motion (e.g., 'reduced', 'standard').

visualProfileContrast.description: User's preference for color contrast in the UI (e.g., 'standard', 'high').

visualProfileFontScaling.description: User's preference for font scaling, represented as a multiplier or percentage.

UserLayout.title: UserLayout
UserLayout.description: Defines a user's customized dashboard layout for a specific mode, including panel configurations and grid settings, supporting schema versioning.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserLayout entity.

modeId.description: Identifier of the mode this layout applies to (e.g., 'MinimalMode', 'ProDeskMode').

schemaVersion.description: The version of the layout schema, used for migration purposes.

layoutId.description: A unique identifier for this specific layout instance within the user's modes.

lastMigratedAt.description: Timestamp of the last successful migration of this layout schema.

panelConfig.description: An array of configurations for each panel displayed within this layout.

gridConfig.description: Configuration string or JSON representing the grid layout properties (e.g., column count, row height, cell sizes).

ExperimentAssignment.title: ExperimentAssignment
ExperimentAssignment.description: Records a user's assignment to an A/B test experiment or feature flag variant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExperimentAssignment entity.

experimentId.description: Identifier of the experiment or feature flag (e.g., 'onboarding_variant').

variantId.description: The specific variant assigned to the user within the experiment (e.g., 'workflow_copy', 'brain_ui_copy').

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was assigned to this variant.

Feedback.title: Feedback
Feedback.description: Stores user-submitted feedback, issues, or 'confusion points' for application improvement.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Feedback entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the feedback or issue.

eventContext.description: Optional contextual information about the user's activity or UI state when the feedback was submitted (e.g., current URL, mode ID).

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the feedback was submitted.

UserEvent.title: UserEvent
UserEvent.description: Logs significant user actions and events within the application, such as onboarding step completion or mode usage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserEvent entity.

eventType.description: The type of event that occurred (e.g., 'onboarding_step_completed', 'mode_selected', 'panel_added').

eventDetails.description: Optional JSON string containing specific details relevant to the event (e.g., {'step': 3}, {'mode': 'ProDeskMode'}).

definition.description: Stores core information about a user, including their role, creation, and last activity timestamps.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.
